ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the company belongs to */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_industry" TEXT /* Specific industry the company operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* Current status of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_category_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_parent_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_period" INTEGER /* ID of the metric period */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_currency" TEXT /* Currency used for financial metrics */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_period FOREIGN KEY ("metric_period") REFERENCES metric_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user is associated with */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "user_api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "type_parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent metric type */,
  "type_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the metric type */,
  "type_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_types_type_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_parent_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric period */,
  "period_parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent metric period */,
  "period_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the metric period */,
  "period_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the metric period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_periods_period_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_parent_id") REFERENCES metric_periods ("period_id")
)
